title: Hidden-structure discovery in weighted monotone subsequence problems
overarching_problem: Identify hidden assumptions and recurring lemmas that govern provability across a family of weighted monotone subsequence conjectures.
success_criteria: Surface recurring unnamed lemmas across related runs
Map which assumptions are structurally necessary
Identify boundary points where tiny statement changes alter provability
Propose candidate generalizations worth human review
non_goals: Do not optimize only for proving the original theorem
Do not treat one failed run as evidence of falsity
Do not wander into unrelated theorem families
